features: DURACELL cr2025 LITHIUM COIN BATTERIES are ideal for use in key fobs, car key remotes, sensors, medical and sports devices
UP TO 70% EXTRA LIFE (vs minimum average duration Electronic Key IEC standard test for 2025 Lithium Coin; Results may vary by device and usage patterns)
OUR MOST SECURE BATTERY EVER** in partnership with European Association of Paediatrics (**specific to 2032, 2025, 2016 thanks to the bitter taste ring on the cell and baby secure packaging)
BABY SECURE TECHNOLOGY: A non-toxic bitter taste ring-shaped layer with Bitrex applied on both sides of the cell to discourage swallowing by babies and toddlers.
BABY SECURE PACKAGING: With double blister that is difficult to open without scissors
GUARANTEED LIFE FOR 10 YEARS IN STORAGE
